facebook.caption:
POV: you wandered off Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and found Phu Quoc Centre.

Local market energy. Real prices. None of the resort-area markup.

This is where the island does its actual shopping. Grab street food, pick up supplies, watch the city move.

Address: 1 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Khu 1. Rated 4.3★ across 163 reviews.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking into Phu Quoc Centre and it's nothing like the tourist strip. Stalls, locals, real market chaos. This is the Phu Quoc they don't put on the resort brochure.
